title: En Uyir ennai vittu lyrics Ra One Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: En Uyir ennai vittu
Singers: Chinmayee
Lyrics: Vairamuthu
Movie: Ra one.
Music: Vishal-Shekhar

En, Uyir ennai vittu pirindha pinne
en dhegam mattum vazhnthidumo
kannerile meen vaazhumo
Ne, en udalukul uyir allava
orey uyir naam allavo
udal vazhave,uyir pogumo

Irudhayam thulaana piragu
Idigalai thaangadhu pattupoochi siragu
ini endhan vaazhve veeno, verumayo

Mannil mel oru maamalaiyum vizhundhadhum enna
Malai vaan konda aruvigal veelndhu aluvadhum enna (2)

When you go when you leave then you take a little piece of me
There's a hole in my soul coz you take a little piece of me

Un kannil dhaane naan paarthu kondaen
en kanne ponaal naan enna kaanben
un seviyil thaane naan oligal ketpen
seviye ponaal yaar paadal ketpen
kannirandum kaneeril mithakka
kaatruku nizhal illai kaneerai thudaika
vaazhvinai ilandhapin vaazhva oh nee vaa vaa (Mannil mel oru..)

Nadhiyodu pogum, kumil pola vaazhkai
enge udaiyum yaar solla koodum
Elaiyodu valaiyum mazhai neerai pola
udalodu jeevan sollamal pogum
yire naan enna aaven
unarve illaadha kannaadi pole
maranathai vella vazhi illaya nee soll..

Mannil mel oru maamalaiyum vilundhadhum enna
Malai vaan konda aruvigal veelndhu aluvadhum enna (repeats)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and separation, reflecting the pain of losing a loved one.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

In Ra One, this song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the protagonist's emotional struggles and connections.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Chinmayi and composed by Vishal-Shekhar.

When was this song released?

En Uyir ennai vittu was released on October 15, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In En Uyir ennai vittu, the protagonist grapples with the pain of separation and the longing for love. The song beautifully conveys the emotions of heartbreak and nostalgia, making it a poignant moment in Ra One. With Chinmayi's soulful rendition and Vairamuthu's evocative lyrics, listeners are taken on an emotional journey. The melody resonates with anyone who has experienced love and loss, making it a timeless classic.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: En Uyir ennai vittu from Ra One is a soul-stirring melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Sung beautifully by Chinmayi, this song showcases the lyrical brilliance of Vairamuthu paired with the enchanting music of Vishal-Shekhar. Experience the emotional depth and romantic vibe that makes this track a timeless favorite.
stanzaMeanings: After you leave me, will my body continue to live? Will the fish in my tears survive? Isn't there a life in my body? Don't we all have just one life? Will the body live on, or will the life leave?
After the heart breaks, I can't bear this pain. Should I live my life or is it just meaningless?
On the earth, a mountain has fallen, what does that mean for me? The mountain that the sky carries, what does that mean for me?
When you go, when you leave, you take a little piece of me. There's a hole in my soul because you take a little piece of me.

I saw you in your eyes, if I lose my eyes, what will I see? I will listen to your voice, if I lose my voice, who will sing? There’s no shadow for the tears in my eyes, life will be lost if I don’t have tears. Oh, come back to life.

Life flows like a river, where does it lead? Who can say? Like the rainwater that falls on the leaves, life will go on without saying anything. What am I to do? You have no feelings, like a mirror that doesn’t reflect. There’s no way to escape death, you say...
On the earth, a mountain has fallen, what does that mean for me? The mountain that the sky carries, what does that mean for me?
